The '''''Dawn Beat''''' was one of the many [[Starship/Legends|starships]] that worked for and participated in [[Talon Karrde]]'s vast and varied [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operations. The ship was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YZ-775 medium transport|YZ-775]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Like all of Karrde's other ships, the name is a pun. It sounds like "Downbeat".

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
